arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand reveals key Man Utd worry for Tottenham Europa League final
arts.sum: Manchester United are desperate to end their season with silverware as they gear up for a crucial Europa League final against Tottenham, with both teams coming into the clash in poor form

arts.ttl: Video footage shows Man United and Tottenham fans violently clashing in San Sebastian - 48 miles from Europa League final venue in Bilbao
arts.sum: Thousands of supporters of each side have flown out to the Spanish City for the game, which will define the seasons of the two sides, who sit 16th and 17th in the Premier League respectively.

arts.ttl: Key quotes from Ruben Amorim's pre-Spurs Europa League final press conference
arts.sum: “A new future, for me it is not the case but it is going to help us to finish the season, if people will look at our team in a different way because winning a European title is really important. The players know, everyone knows, the fans know, the staff know but winning a European title can help us have that feeling to build the future.”

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Manchester United's Europa League final is glory or bust for the Premier League's damned, writes OLIVER HOLT
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT IN BILBAO: United and Spurs have been so poor, it is difficult to know whether to be proud two English teams have reached a major European final, or to be embarrassed.

arts.ttl: Europa League final: How £100million prize pot presents sliding doors moment for Man United and Tottenham ahead of their huge Bilbao showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham 's Europa League final is worth as much as a minor nation's economy. Next week the slumbering giants will meet in Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's joke with Bruno Fernandes shows harsh reality facing Ange Postecoglou in Bilbao
arts.sum: The Europa League final has been billed as make-or-break for both Ruben Amorim and Ange Postecoglou - but the Manchester United boss is showing little concern about his future

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Man United: Ruben Amorim shocked by recovery of Red Devils ace for Europa League final
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Joshua Zirkzee's fast return from a hamstring injury to make the Europa League final caught him by surprise.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes gives THREE big reasons why Europa League glory would 'change the future' of Man United ahead of Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes believes winning the Europa League won't change Man United's dreadful season, but it could have a big impact on the future at Old Trafford. They face Tottenham on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Europa League final: Tottenham WAGs pictured flying out to Bilbao ahead of winner-takes-all tie against Man United
arts.sum: Tottenham players' WAGs were pictured flying out to Bilbao ahead of the Europa League final against Manchester United on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: 'Has become a problem': Jamie O'Hara says Tottenham have one really big issue ahead of Europa League final v Man United
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have the opportunity to win their first major trophy since 2008 when they take on Manchester United in Wednesday’s Europa League final. Tottenham...
